facts.claim: Cluster covers 32 canonical rules spanning PDF document export, digital signatures (CryptoCubo), billing compliance (Glosa-Zero), file upload/retrieval, and Tasy/Oracle integration for homecare/trilhas system
Status distribution: 22 OK, 6 DISCREPANCY, 4 AMBIGUOUS. Verification: 1 VERIFIED (formula type), 28 NOT_APPLICABLE, 2 UNVERIFIABLE (mechanical formulas)

Rule types: 17 data-validation, 6 decision-tree, 5 workflow, 4 formula, 2 validation, 1 eligibility, 1 triage-eligibility. Categories: 17 billing-admin/data-validation, 7 billing-admin, 5 care-pathway, 1 scheduling-operational, 1 triage-eligibility

Systemic issues: (A) Boolean query-param parsing inconsistency (b64 flag uses truthy string check vs assinatura explicit [true/True] check); (B) Missing validation: dia parameter (TypeError 500) and unguarded .first() on dt_entrada (AttributeError 500); (C) Triple-divergent category code catalogs: runtime 54 codes vs Arquivo.Categoria 34 vs Leito.CategoriaArquivo 33 with EI omitted from Leito; (D) PIN fallback encoding asymmetry (base64 normal path vs raw env value fallback); (E) Hardcoded CryptoCubo defaults: advanced (not qualified) signature, perfil=adrb, icpbr=False (compliance-relevant, MP 2.200-2/ICP-Brasil impact)

PT-BR controlled vocabularies: 54 document category codes (Arquivo.categoria enum: DIETA, MEDICAMENTO_SOLUÇÃO, SN_ACM, RECOMENDACAO_ENFERMAGEM, RECOMENDACAO, plus 34-value Arquivo.Categoria subset missing 20 codes); alert levels {VERMELHO, AMARELO, NEUTRO}; 16-criteria Glosa-Zero checks with PT-BR labels ('checagem de medicacao atrasada', 'assinatura', 'troca de filtro VM'); billing codes (lancamento 501 auto-posting via amh_gerar_lancamento_auto Tasy stored proc); evolução note types per discipline (EHCMED, EHCENF, EHCFIS, EHCTER, EHCMUS, EHCNUT, EHCPSI, EHCFON, EHCFCT, EHCINT, Vida Conecta codes PRHC/BHHC)

Cluster feeds: governance/billing (Glosa-Zero compliance pathway, 16-criteria escalation tracking, signature inconsistency audits via Inconsistencia.Assinatura records), platform/experience (PDF export/merge, file upload/retrieval via AMHDocs proxy), platform/governance (electronic signatures via CryptoCubo with legal strength implications, audit-log persistence of signature failures and billing postings to Tasy)

load_bearing_rules.what: Glosa-Zero automatic billing alert engine: 16 boolean criteria flags with two independently-computed (and disagreeing) alert classifications — persisted alerta field can never be VERMELHO (permanently empty bucket), but view-computed tipo_alerta counts all 16 criteria and DOES reach VERMELHO (divergence)

Three hand-maintained, out-of-sync document category code catalogs: runtime dictionary 54 codes, Arquivo.Categoria 34 codes, Leito.CategoriaArquivo 33 codes (missing EI/Evolução interna) — type-safe enum mismatch risk
CryptoCubo digital-signature defaults hardcoded as tipo=advanced (not qualified), perfil=adrb, icpbr=False — affects legal validity under MP 2.200-2/ICP-Brasil norms
PIN/ALIAS fallback asymmetry: __ALIAS = cpf or env-default (safe), __PIN = base64.b64encode(...) or env-default (unsafe: None crashes, empty-string fallback not base64-encoded)
PDF export b64 query-param uses truthy string check (any non-empty string including 'false' triggers base64 mode) vs assinatura explicit in-list check — inconsistent boolean flag parsing
Prescription PDF dt_entrada lookup: unguarded .first() on empty queryset raises AttributeError (500) vs balanco-hidrico's guarded .exists().first() pattern
Prescription PDF dia parameter: missing presence check, raises unhandled TypeError (500) vs balanco-hidrico's explicit validation
Digital-signature eligibility gate: document signed via CryptoCubo only if user has both CPF AND PIN (either missing → unsigned, no exception, warning logged)
PDF merge (combinar_documentos): all-or-nothing validation gate — ANY invalid/timeout/unparseable URL causes entire operation abort with 400, no partial merge produced
Evolution libération auto-posts to Tasy (stored proc amh_gerar_lancamento_auto, fixed code 501, ConnectionError swallowed) — meaning of magic constant 501 and NULL params not documented

open_questions: Which value of lancamento code 501 in Tasy stored proc amh_gerar_lancamento_auto represents 'evolution auto-posting'? (RULE-015)
Does Leito.CategoriaArquivo intentionally omit EI or is it a gap? (RULE-020)
Are the CryptoCubo defaults (tipo=advanced, icpbr=False) compliant with organizational e-signature policy under MP 2.200-2/ICP-Brasil? (RULE-032)
Should the b64 and assinatura query-param parsers use consistent boolean-check semantics? (RULE-021, 004)
